---
title: "Basic package usage"
author: "Giacomo Antonello"
date: "2026-04-20"
output: html_document
---

# Validate a ChocoPhlAn version

In order to be able to map the wanted SGB to an available taxonomy file

```{r}
validate_mpa_version(mpa_version = "202403")
```

# Find full taxonomy of a SGB

NB: Standard taxonomy only supports the latest, for now (2026-04-20)

```{r}
# Standard MetaPhlAn taxonomy
get_sgb_taxonomy("SGB8271", "mpa", chocophlan_datestamp = "202403")
get_sgb_taxonomy("t__SGB8271", "mpa", chocophlan_datestamp = "202403")

# GTDB taxonomy
get_sgb_taxonomy("SGB8271", "GTDB", chocophlan_datestamp = "202403")
get_sgb_taxonomy("t__SGB8271", "GTDB", chocophlan_datestamp = "202403")
```

# load taxonomy tree

```{r}
read
```
